summary: Tested Schedule Swap/Substitution Feature for Tomich Gestão de Mídia. All backend APIs (14/14 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly. Full swap workflow tested: create request → view by other user → accept → schedule updated.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/my-schedules - returns schedules for current user
BACKEND: GET /api/schedules/swap-requests - returns pending swap requests with enriched data
BACKEND: POST /api/schedules/swap-request - creates swap request successfully
BACKEND: POST /api/schedules/swap-request - creates swap request with specific target member
BACKEND: POST /api/schedules/swap-request - returns 404 for invalid schedule
BACKEND: POST /api/schedules/swap-request - returns 400 for duplicate pending request
BACKEND: GET /api/schedules/my-swap-requests - returns user's own swap requests
BACKEND: DELETE /api/schedules/swap-requests/{id} - cancels own swap request
BACKEND: DELETE /api/schedules/swap-requests/{id} - returns 404 for nonexistent request
BACKEND: POST /api/schedules/swap-requests/{id}/respond - returns 400 when responding to own request
BACKEND: POST /api/schedules/swap-requests/{id}/respond - returns 404 for invalid swap_id
BACKEND: POST /api/schedules/swap-requests/{id}/respond - accepts swap and updates schedule correctly
BACKEND: POST /api/schedules/{id}/attendance - confirms attendance
BACKEND: POST /api/schedules/{id}/attendance - declines attendance
FRONTEND: Dashboard shows 'Minhas Escalas' section with user's schedules
FRONTEND: Schedule cards show HOJE badge (red) for today's schedules
FRONTEND: Schedule cards show AMANHÃ badge (orange) for tomorrow's schedules
FRONTEND: Schedule cards show Pendente badge (amber) for unconfirmed
FRONTEND: Schedule cards show Confirmado badge (green) for confirmed
FRONTEND: Schedule cards show 'Não vai' badge (red) for declined
FRONTEND: Confirmar button works - confirms attendance with success toast
FRONTEND: Não Posso button works - declines attendance
FRONTEND: Swap button opens modal dialog
FRONTEND: Swap modal shows schedule info (title, date, time)
FRONTEND: Swap modal has required reason textarea
FRONTEND: Swap modal has optional target member dropdown with all members
FRONTEND: Submit swap creates request with success toast
FRONTEND: 'Solicitações de Troca' section shows pending requests
FRONTEND: Swap request cards show requester name, schedule info, reason
FRONTEND: Cancel button removes own swap request
FRONTEND: 'Mudei de ideia - Vou!' button changes declined to confirmed
FRONTEND: 'Solicitar Troca' button appears on confirmed schedules
seed_data_creation: Created test swap requests during testing. One swap was accepted (Postagem no Instagram - now assigned to Danilo). Aula de Segunda also swapped to Danilo via previous test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Schedule Swap/Substitution feature fully tested. Flow: User creates swap request (POST /api/schedules/swap-request) → Other users see request with can_accept=true (GET /api/schedules/swap-requests) → User accepts (POST /api/schedules/swap-requests/{id}/respond) → Schedule updated (assigned_members changed, substitutes record added). Cancel works via DELETE. UI shows 'Minhas Escalas' section on Dashboard with all action buttons working.

feature_test_summary.my_schedules_section: PASS - Shows user's assigned schedules with badges
feature_test_summary.confirm_button: PASS - Confirms attendance, shows success toast
feature_test_summary.schedule_update_on_accept: PASS - Removes requester, adds accepter, records in substitutes
